creator: tod.jackson@gmail.com
text:
I'm not really set up for debugging. I don't know if this is a gdm bug or a gnome-keyring bug.

(lldb) bt all
* thread #1, name = 'gnome-keyring-daemo', stop reason = signal SIGSEGV
  * frame #0: 0x0000000800a525ba
    frame #1: 0x0000000000000005
  thread #2, name = 'pool-spawner', stop reason = signal SIGSEGV
    frame #0: 0x0000000800a4ab3c
    frame #1: 0x0000000800a5a660
  thread #3, name = 'gmain', stop reason = signal SIGSEGV
    frame #0: 0x0000000800ba556a
    frame #1: 0x0000000800a58f56
  thread #4, name = 'gdbus', stop reason = signal SIGSEGV
    frame #0: 0x0000000800ba556a
    frame #1: 0x0000000800a58f56
  thread #5, name = 'timer', stop reason = signal SIGSEGV
    frame #0: 0x0000000800a4ab3c
    frame #1: 0x0000000800a5a660

Anyway, I can log in once, but if I log out gdm doesn't restart.

13.0-RELEASE-p7
gdm-41.3_2
gnome-keyring-40.0
